meta_title: For Founders: analytics setup to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Analytics Setup to Solve Project Stall
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Use this Intermediate Checklist to implement analytics and ship faster using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You aren't failing because of code; you're failing because of uncertainty. By instrumenting your MVP with high-fidelity analytics, you transform 'gut feelings' into data-backed product decisions. This removes the fear of shipping, provides a clear roadmap for iteration, and ensures your technical resources are focused exclusively on features that drive revenue.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'almost finished' projects—monuments to founders who lost their way in a feature-creep fog. You start with a vision, but without a feedback loop, the code becomes a maze where you lose your sense of direction and, eventually, your motivation.

But the fix isn't more discipline; it's more signal. When you instrument your application, you stop building in the dark. You start seeing the friction points where users drop off and the 'aha' moments that signal product-market fit. This isn't just tracking events; it’s building the navigation system that turns a stalled project into a high-velocity business.

steps.title: Define Your North Star Metric
steps.description: Before writing code, define the single metric that proves user value. This prevents scope creep by forcing you to focus on the 'Happy Path'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current SaaS feature list and identify the one action that correlates most strongly with user retention. Suggest a tracking event name for this action.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Identify core retention event for my SaaS based on the current codebase directory'

steps.title: Automate Event Schema Generation
steps.description: Standardize your tracking. Use a schema to ensure your analytics data is clean and actionable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a TypeScript interface for a unified analytics event tracker that supports posthog and mixpanel payloads.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Create src/lib/analytics.ts with a typed event tracking function'

steps.title: Instrument the Onboarding Funnel
steps.description: Track the journey from landing page to first 'aha' moment. If users quit, you need to know exactly which step broke their trust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a wrapper component for my onboarding flow that fires an analytics event on every step transition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Instrument all components in src/components/onboarding with analytics.track calls'

steps.title: Implement Session Replay for Context
steps.description: Events tell you what happened; replays tell you why. Integrate session recording to witness user confusion in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide the configuration code to initialize session recording in my React app, ensuring PII is masked.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Add session recording provider to app root'

steps.title: Create Automated 'Stall' Alerts
steps.description: Set up a webhook alert that fires when key conversion rates drop below your baseline, preventing 'silent' failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a serverless function that checks my analytics database for a 20% drop in signup-to-activation conversion and alerts via Slack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new API route /api/alerts/monitor to query analytics data'

pro_tips: Never track everything. If you track 100 things, you track nothing. Focus on 3-5 KPIs that correlate to revenue.
Use 'feature flags' in tandem with analytics to A/B test your way out of design paralysis.
Anonymize user IDs immediately to avoid GDPR/CCPA headaches that kill momentum.
Set your analytics dashboard as your browser homepage to keep your North Star top-of-mind every time you open a new tab.
Automate your reporting. If you have to manually export CSVs, you won't look at the data.
content.next_steps: Review your data daily for 14 days. If a feature has zero usage, delete it. Ruthless pruning is the secret to finishing projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing and start shipping. Every day you wait is a day of feedback you're missing. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
